theme_tagline: The World Cup Quarterfinals Are Here — And Lady E Luck Is Playing For Gold
primary_hook: FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarterfinals — Spain vs. Belgium (3 PM ET, SoFi Stadium LA)
secondary_hook: Fortune Friday energy + Piña Colada Day (summer Friday vibes amplify the party feel)
trending_topic_details: World Cup 2026 is at quarterfinal stage. Spain vs. Belgium kicks off at 3 PM ET at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles. The tournament is dominating every major platform — Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, X. The viral anthem is 'Dai Dai' by Shakira and Burna Boy. Female fans and analysis content trending hard. Every brand with an audience is tying in. Lady E Luck connects through the shared energy of high-stakes moments, golden wins, and community celebration.
special_day_details: National Piña Colada Day — fun summer Friday overlap that reinforces the tropical party/celebration angle
content_angle: Lady E Luck is the ultimate viewing party destination — where every Quarterfinal kick is matched by Golden Boot Jackpots, Hat Trick Bonuses, and a community that wins together all day long.
deals_hook: Golden Boot Jackpot — biggest recharge wins a multiplier bonus, all day
Hat Trick Bonus — 3 recharges during match hours (1PM–6PM ET) = stacked bonus
Penalty Kick Free Spin — share referral code, friend joins = both get free spin bonus
Halftime Reload — mystery midnight drop for active players (10PM–Midnight)
